---
title: "GPT Decoder Architecture Diagram"
format: html
jupyter:
  kernelspec:
    name: "conda-env-gene46100-py"
    language: "python"
    display_name: "gene46100"
---

```{python}
from graphviz import Digraph
from IPython.display import Image

def create_decoder_diagram():
    # Create a directed graph
    # Dimensions: T = sequence length, d = d_model (embedding dim),
    #             h = n_heads, d/h = per-head dim, V = vocab size
    dot = Digraph(comment='GPT Decoder', format='png')
    dot.attr(rankdir='TB')  # Top to Bottom layout
    dot.attr('node', shape='box', style='filled', fillcolor='lightblue')
    dot.attr('edge', fontsize='10', fontcolor='#555555')

    # --- Layers ---

    # Input Section
    dot.node('Tokens', 'Token Indices', fillcolor='lightyellow')
    dot.node('Input', 'Input Embedding', fillcolor='lightyellow')
    dot.node('PosEnc', 'Positional Encoding', fillcolor='lightyellow')

    # Add & Norm 1 (after input + positional encoding)
    dot.node('AddNorm1', 'Add & Norm', shape='ellipse', fillcolor='white')

    # Masked Multi-Head Self Attention — show internal head split and score shape
    dot.node('MHA_Self',
             'Masked Multi-Head Self-Attention\n'
             'Q, K, V split → (T, h, d/h) each\n'
             'scores: (h, T, T)',
             fillcolor='lightgreen')

    # Add & Norm 2 (after attention)
    dot.node('AddNorm2', 'Add & Norm', shape='ellipse', fillcolor='white')

    # Feed Forward Network — show internal expansion
    dot.node('FFN',
             'Feed-Forward Network\n'
             'expand: d → 4d → d',
             fillcolor='lightcoral')

    # Output Section
    dot.node('Linear', 'Linear Projection', fillcolor='pink')
    dot.node('Softmax', 'Softmax', fillcolor='pink')
    dot.node('Output', 'Next Token Prediction', shape='ellipse', fillcolor='orange')

    # --- Connections (edge labels show tensor shape on the wire) ---

    dot.edge('Tokens', 'Input', label='(T,)')
    dot.edge('Input', 'AddNorm1', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('PosEnc', 'AddNorm1', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('AddNorm1', 'MHA_Self', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('MHA_Self', 'AddNorm2', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('AddNorm2', 'FFN', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('FFN', 'Linear', label='(T, d)')
    dot.edge('Linear', 'Softmax', label='(T, V)')
    dot.edge('Softmax', 'Output', label='(T, V)')

    # Render the diagram
    output_filename = 'decoder_architecture'
    dot.render(output_filename, view=False, cleanup=False)
    print(f"Diagram saved as {output_filename}.png")
    return output_filename + '.png'

png_path = create_decoder_diagram()
Image(png_path)
```
